title: IMPORTANT
body:
IMPORTANT
============================================================================

This folder includes my solution to project 0. 

However, these modules will **not** work if called from this folder.

Either copy these files into `project0`:

```
toolkit/
|__ projects/
|__ |__ project0/
|   |   |__ main.py                 <- Copy here
|   |   |__ task_project0.py        <- Copy here
```

Or replace the import statements in `main.py` with:

```
from projects.project0.task_project0._solution import (
        parse_lines,
        fmt_col_names,
        lines_to_dict,
        mk_prices_dict,
        calc_avg_price,
        )
```
